---
title: "Solutions Open Source"
date: today
date-format: "YYYY-MM-DD"
---

# Harnesses Open Source

## Cline

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/cline/cline` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, Anthropic) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | PostHog (désactivé en self-hosted) |
| ZDR | ✅ (self-hosted mode) |

**Points forts** : VS Code extension, self-hosted mode via `~/.cline/endpoints.json` auto-désactive PostHog + build-time OTEL (PR #8790), MCP support, plan/act modes.

**Points faibles** : Pas d'autocomplétion inline, dépend de l'API LLM choisie.

```bash
# Self-hosted mode = télémétrie OFF
# Créer ~/.cline/endpoints.json avec config locale → PostHog auto-désactivé
```

## Aider

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/Aider-AI/aider` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Opt-in (10% sampling) |
| ZDR | ✅ (connexion directe machine→AI provider) |

**Points forts** : CLI pur, git-native (commits auto), connexion directe machine→AI provider (pas de serveur intermédiaire), support multi-model, repo map.

**Points faibles** : CLI uniquement (pas d'IDE), pas d'autocomplétion.

```bash
# Désactiver analytics
aider --analytics-disable

# Avec Ollama local (zéro télémétrie)
aider --model ollama/qwen3:32b
```

## Continue.dev

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/continuedev/continue` |
| Modèle | Any (OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, local) |
| Niveau autonomie | L2-L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (local mode) |

**Points forts** : VS Code + JetBrains, autocomplétion + chat, config flexible, support local models, RAG sur codebase.

**Points faibles** : Moins puissant que Cline pour l'agentic, setup plus complexe.

## Goose (Block)

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/block/goose` |
| Modèle | Any (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible) |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Off par défaut |
| ZDR | ✅ |

**Points forts** : Télémétrie off par défaut, CLI + VS Code, MCP support natif, Ollama integration simple.

```bash
# Télémétrie déjà off par défaut, mais pour être explicite:
export GOOSE_TELEMETRY_ENABLED=false
```

## Roo Code

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/RooCodeInc/Roo-Code` |
| Modèle | Any |
| Niveau autonomie | L3 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (local mode) |

**Points forts** : Fork de Cline avec améliorations, modes (architect, coder, tester), MCP support.

## OpenHands

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands` |
| Modèle | Any |
| Niveau autonomie | L4 |
| Licence | MIT |
| Télémétrie | Configurable |
| ZDR | ✅ (self-hosted) |

**Points forts** : Agent fully-autonome, sandbox Docker, browser + terminal + editor, résolution d'issues end-to-end.

**Points faibles** : Plus lourd, nécessite Docker, coût LLM élevé (multi-turn long).

## Tabby

| Caractéristique | Valeur |
|-----------------|--------|
| Repo | `github.com/TabbyML/tabby` |
| Modèle | Self-hosted (StarCoder, CodeLlama, custom) |
| Niveau autonomie | L1 |
| Licence | Apache 2.0 |
| Télémétrie | Aucune en self-hosted |
| ZDR | ✅ (100% on-prem) |

**Points forts** : 100% on-prem, aucune télémétrie, fine-tuning sur codebase entreprise, autocomplétion inline.

**Points faibles** : L1 seulement, pas d'agent, nécessite GPU pour de bonnes performances.

## Outils découverts automatiquement

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_OSS_START -->
### [rtk](https://github.com/rtk-ai/rtk)
CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% on common dev commands. Single Rust binary, zero dependencies

⭐ 71.6k | `Rust` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agentic-coding`, `ai-coding`, `anthropic`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `command-line-tool`, `cost-reduction`, `developer-tools`

### [ruflo](https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo)
🌊 The leading agent meta-harness. Deploy intelligent multi-player swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning intelligence,...

⭐ 64.8k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `agentic-framework`, `agentic-workflow`, `agents`, `ai-agents`, `ai-assistant`, `ai-coding`, `ai-skills`

### [gpt-engineer](https://github.com/AntonOsika/gpt-engineer)
CLI platform to experiment with codegen. Precursor to: https://lovable.dev

⭐ 55.2k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `autonomous-agent`, `code-generation`, `codebase-generation`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `gpt-4`, `gpt-engineer`

### [agentic-awesome-skills](https://github.com/sickn33/agentic-awesome-skills)
Installable GitHub library of 1,900+ agentic skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex CLI, Autohand Code, Gemini CLI, Antigravity, and more. Includes specialized plugins, installer CLI, bundles, workf...

⭐ 43.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-skills`, `ai-agent-skills`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `ai-workflows`, `antigravity`, `antigravity-skills`

### [gpt-pilot](https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot)
The first real AI developer

⭐ 33.7k | `Python` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `codegen`, `coding-assistant`, `developer-tools`, `gpt-4`, `research-project`

### [DeepSeek-Reasonix](https://github.com/esengine/DeepSeek-Reasonix)
DeepSeek-native AI coding agent for your terminal. Engineered around prefix-cache stability — leave it running.

⭐ 27.1k | `Go` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent`, `agent-framework`, `ai-agent`, `ai-coding`, `cli`, `coding-agent`, `deepseek`, `developer-tools`

### [serena](https://github.com/oraios/serena)
A powerful MCP toolkit for coding, providing semantic retrieval and editing capabilities - the IDE for your agent

⭐ 26.5k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent`, `ai`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `ide`, `jetbrains`

### [kilocode](https://github.com/Kilo-Org/kilocode)
Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform. Build, ship, and iterate faster with the most popular open source coding agent.

⭐ 26.3k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-age`, `ai-coding`, `ai-developer-tools`, `chatgpt`, `claude`, `cli`, `gemini`

### [code-review-graph](https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph)
Local-first code intelligence graph for MCP and CLI. Builds a persistent map of your codebase so AI coding tools read only what matters, with benchmarked context reductions on reviews and large-rep...

⭐ 19.7k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `code-review`, `graphrag`, `incremental`, `knowledge-graph`, `llm`

### [claude-context](https://github.com/zilliztech/claude-context)
Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.

⭐ 12.1k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent`, `agentic-rag`, `ai-coding`, `claude-code`, `code-generation`, `code-search`, `cursor`, `embedding`

### [codeburn](https://github.com/getagentseal/codeburn)
Free, local tool to track AI coding token usage and cost across 31 tools and agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini and more), by model, project, and task. npx codeburn

⭐ 8.7k | `TypeScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `claude-code`, `cli`, `codex`, `cost-tracking`, `cursor-ide`, `developer-tools`, `menubar`

### [loop-engineering](https://github.com/cobusgreyling/loop-engineering)
Practical patterns, starters & CLI tools for loop engineering with AI coding agents. Design systems that prompt and orchestrate agents (inspired by Addy Osmani and Boris Cherny). Includes loop-audi...

⭐ 8.3k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agentic-ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `anthropic`, `automation`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `codex`

### [ccpm](https://github.com/automazeio/ccpm)
Project management skill system for Agents that uses GitHub Issues and Git worktrees for parallel agent execution.

⭐ 8.3k | `Shell` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `claude`, `claude-code`, `project-management`, `vibe-coding`

### [my-git](https://github.com/xirong/my-git)
A practical Git & GitHub handbook for modern engineering teams and AI-native development workflows. | 现代工程团队与 AI 编程时代的 Git / GitHub 实战手册

⭐ 7.4k | `Python` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-14
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `ai-native-development`, `git`, `git-flow`, `git-workflow`, `gitflow`, `github`, `github-flow`

### [superpowers-zh](https://github.com/jnMetaCode/superpowers-zh)
🦸 AI 编程超能力 · 中文增强版 — superpowers（116k+ ⭐）完整汉化 + 6 个中国原创 skills，让 Claude Code / Copilot CLI / Hermes Agent / Cursor / Windsurf / Kiro / Gemini CLI 等 16 款 AI 编程工具真正会干活

⭐ 7.0k | `JavaScript` | Licence: MIT | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-skills`, `agentic-coding`, `ai-coding`, `chinese`, `claude-code`, `code-review`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`

### [Kaku](https://github.com/tw93/Kaku)
🎃 A fast, out-of-the-box terminal built for AI coding.

⭐ 5.6k | `Rust` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai-coding`, `macos`, `rust`, `serial`, `terminal`, `terminal-app`, `terminal-emulator`, `vibe-coding`

### [claude-code-ultimate-guide](https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide)
The most comprehensive Claude Code guide: agentic workflows, hooks, skills, MCP servers, quizzes, and production-ready templates. 430K+ lines.

⭐ 5.5k | `Python` | Licence: CC-BY-SA-4.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agentic-coding`, `ai-assistant`, `ai-coding`, `ai-pair-programming`, `ai-security`, `anthropic`, `best-practices`, `claude`

### [AgentsMesh](https://github.com/AgentsMesh/AgentsMesh)
The AI Agent Workforce Platform. Remote AI workstations (AgentPods) with PTY sandbox + git worktree isolation, multi-agent collaboration via channels and pod bindings, built-in Kanban with MR/PR in...

⭐ 2.3k | `Go` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `agent-orchestration`, `agentsmesh`, `ai-agent`, `ai-agent-workforce-platform`, `ai-coding`, `aider`, `claude-code`, `codex-cli`

### [envd](https://github.com/tensorchord/envd)
🏕️ Reproducible development environment for humans and agents

⭐ 2.2k | `Go` | Licence: Apache-2.0 | MAJ: 2026-07-09
**Tags** : `agent`, `buildkit`, `code-agent`, `codex`, `developer-tools`, `development-environment`, `docker`, `hacktoberfest`

### [Nanocoder](https://github.com/Nano-Collective/nanocoder)
Local-first CLI coding agent built with React and Ink. !GitHub Repo stars

⭐ 2.2k | `TypeScript` | Licence: NOASSERTION | MAJ: 2026-07-17
**Tags** : `ai`, `ai-agents`, `ai-coding`, `coding-agents`, `llm`, `llm-inference`, `ollama`, `openai`

<!-- TOOLS_HARNESS_OSS_END -->
